ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Decision Tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "model_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the model (e.g., depth of a decision tree, number of layers in an MLP) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "model_documentation" TEXT /* Link to documentation or additional resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "data_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "data_labels" INTEGER /* Number of labels or classes in the dataset */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Information on how the dataset is split (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone number, Slack ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters used in the model version */,
  "model_performance" TEXT /* Summary of performance metrics for the version */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "dataset_changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in the version */,
  "dataset_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the evaluation results */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user can edit the model */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the setting */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the setting */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting parameter */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting parameter */,
  "setting_status" TEXT /* Status of the setting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_settings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_settings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
